## tscli set user role

Update a user's role

```
tscli set user role [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help          help for role
      --role string   New role (owner|member|admin|it-admin|network-admin|billing-admin|auditor|all)
      --user string   User ID or email
```

### Options inherited from parent commands

```
  -k, --api-key string   Tailscale API key
  -d, --debug            Dump HTTP requests/responses
  -o, --output string    Output: [json yaml human pretty]
  -n, --tailnet string   Tailscale tailnet (default "-")
```
